_comment: WHMCS onboarding product map for FFC. Captured from the products enumeration (GetClientsProducts custom fields). Keys under custom_fields are the WHMCS product custom-field ids passed to AddOrder via -CustomFieldsJson. Verify against a fresh products export if WHMCS changes.

custom_fields.3: What is the legal status of your organization?
custom_fields.5: Do you have a domain name?
custom_fields.6: What is your current/desired domain name?
custom_fields.8: Who is your current hosting provider?
custom_fields.9: Have you been approved by TechSoup.org?
custom_fields.10: Do you have a business email provider?
custom_fields.11: If yes, who is your email provider?
custom_fields.14: What phone number do you want us to reach you at?
custom_fields.15: What is your organization's EIN number?
custom_fields.16: What is the best time to call you?

custom_fields.92: Board Vice President / Vice Chair Individual Email
custom_fields.91: Board Vice President / Vice Chair Phone Number
custom_fields.90: Board Vice President / Vice Chair LinkedIn Link
custom_fields.106: What is the legal status of your organization?
